description: Standard executive-summary flow: read the blackboard, categorize activity, write a one-page summary. Short sequential chain; voting is overkill for a digest.
definitionOfDone: An executive summary for "${context}" is on disk with categorized activity counts and a one-paragraph narrative.

steps.summary: Read the blackboard ledger for ${context} (the relevant time window)
Categorize activity for ${context} (tasks / results / decisions / facts)
